title: Find $$r$$
text: In an expression of the form c * $$b^k$$, the base $$b$$ is the common ratio. Here $$r$$ $$=$$ $$-0.3$$.

title: Check |r|
text: Since $$r$$ $$=$$ $$-0.3$$, we have |r| $$=$$ $$0.3$$ < $$1$$. This means the infinite geometric series converges.

title: Conclusion
text: Because the series is geometric with |r| < $$1$$, the infinite sum is defined.
